docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - LATISHA DANIELLE TAYLOR. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD); HANDWRITTEN NOTE ON ENVELOPE - REUTURN TO SENDRER NO BOX FOUND

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARKEL, JULIE VAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, LATISHA DANIELLE $7,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,329.17 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,629.17, DEFENDANT PERSONALLY GUARANTEED LOAN FOR $7250. PAYABLE FEB 06 - FEB 10, 2022 AND FAILED TO DO SO. *COURT COSTS ($50) TO BE PAID DIRECTLY TO THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
